sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁרון

Transliteration: shârôn

Phonetic: shaw-rone'

BDB Definition:

Sharon = "a plain"
  1. plain, level (noun masculine)
  2. the district lying between the mountains of central Palestine and the Mediterranean Sea and north of Joppa (noun proper locative)
  3. a district on the east of the Jordan around Gilead and Bashan (noun proper locative)

Origin: probably abridged from H3474

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech:
